title: holosteum umbellatum var. glutinosum
intro: Holosteum umbellatum var. glutinosum, also known as sticky cranesbill, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The sticky cranesbill is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and soothing skin irritations. Holosteum umbellatum var. glutinosum can be prepared as an herbal remedy, often in the form of infusions or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
